passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. Nos. 22-23) Read the following information carefully and answer the questions that follow. Point H is 6 m towards the East of point G, point R is 8 m North of point G. Point Q is exactly midway between point R and point G. Point K is 10 m to the South of point Q. Point L is 3 m towards the East of point Q. point S is exactly midway between point G and point H.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Pankaj travels 10 m in North direction, he turns right and travels 20 m. Again he turns towards right and travels 25 m. Then, he turns towards left and travels 15 m. In which direction and how far is Pankaj from his original position?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Amol travels a distance of 10 ft from A to B. Then, he turns to left and travels 5 ft and again turns to left and travels 2 ft. Finally, he turns to left and moves 5 ft. How far is he now from his original position?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Shyam walks 6 m towards East, then turns right and walks 9 m. Again, he turns to his left and walks 6 m. At what distance is he now from his original point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Rohit drives a car from Bengaluru to Mysore. After 80 km he turns right and goes 50 km. After that he again turns to his right and moves on 70 km. Finally, he turns to his right and stops after moving a distance of 50 km. At what distance is Rohit now from Bengaluru?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A man goes 5 km East from his office. He then takes left turn and walks 3 km. He again takes left turn and walks 5 km. How far is he from starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A man travels 2 m towards North, then he turns towards East and travels 3 m. Finally, he travels 6 m in South direction. How far is he from his starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A and B start from the point located in opposite directions. A travels 3 km and B also travels 3 km. Then, A turns towards right and travels 4 km and B turns towards right and travels 4 km. What is the distance between A and B?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A boy goes 3 km South and then takes a turn towards West moves on 5 km. He, then again turns towards North and goes 6 km before turning towards East and moving upto 5 km. How far is the boy now from the starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If a persons walks 4 m towards the South from point L, takes a right turn and walks for another 3 m, then which of the following points would he reach?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If a person walks 8 m towards North from Point S, then which of the following points would he cross and how far will he be from point R?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Ravi travelled 4 km straight toward South. He turned left and travelled 6 km straight, then turned right and travelled 4 km straight. How far is he from the starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Starting from a point, Raju walked 12 m North, he turned right and walked 10 m, he again turned right and walked 12 m. Then he turned left and walked 5 m. How far is he now and in which direction from the starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Ram and Shyam start walking towards North and cover 20 m. Ram turns to his left and Shyam to his right. After sometime, Ram walks to 10 m in the same direction in which he turned. On the other hand, Shyam walks only 7 m. Later, Ram turns towards his left and Shyam to his right. Both walk 25 m forward. How far is Ram from Shyam now?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A man travels 4 km due North, then travels 6 km due East and further travels 4 km due North. How far he is from the starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Ram cycled 10 km Southward from his home, turned right and cycled 6 km, turned right cycled 10 km, turned left and cycled 15 km. How many kilometers will he have cycled to reach straight home?
